Name: CD4_At_Death_LogLogistic_Heterogeneity
Description: The inverse shape parameter of a Weibull distribution that represents the at-death CD4 cell count.

Name: CD4_At_Death_LogLogistic_Scale
Description: The scale parameter of a :term:`Weibull distribution` that represents the at-death CD4 cell count.

Name: CD4_Post_Infection_Weibull_Heterogeneity
Description: The inverse shape parameter of a :term:`Weibull distribution` that represents the post-acute-infection CD4 cell count.

Name: CD4_Post_Infection_Weibull_Scale
Description: The scale parameter of a :term:`Weibull distribution` that represents the post-acute-infection CD4 cell count.

Name: Days_Between_Symptomatic_And_Death_Weibull_Heterogeneity
Description: The time between the onset of AIDS symptoms and death is sampled from a Weibull distribution; this parameter governs the heterogeneity (inverse shape) of the Weibull.

Name: Days_Between_Symptomatic_And_Death_Weibull_Scale
Description: The time between the onset of AIDS symptoms and death is sampled from a Weibull distribution; this parameter governs the scale of the Weibull.

Name: HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_Parameter_Intercept
Description:
This parameter determines the intercept of the scale parameter, ?, for the Weibull distribution used to determine HIV survival time.

Survival time with untreated HIV infection depends on the age of the individual at the time of infection, and is drawn from a Weibull distribution with shape parameter (see **HIV_Adult_Survival_Shape_Parameter**) and scale parameter, ?. The scale parameter is allowed to vary linearly with age as follows:

$\\lambda$ = **HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_Parameter_Intercept** + **HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_ Parameter_Slope** * Age (in years).

Name: HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_Parameter_Slope
Description:
This parameter determines the slope of the scale parameter, ?, for the Weibull distribution used to determine HIV survival time.

Survival time with untreated HIV infection depends on the age of the individual at the time of infection, and is drawn from a Weibull distribution with shape parameter (see **HIV_Adult_Survival_Shape_Parameter**) and scale parameter, ?. The scale parameter is allowed to vary linearly with age as follows:

$\\lambda$ = **HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_Parameter_Intercept** + **HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_ Parameter_Slope** * Age (in years).

Because survival time with HIV becomes shorter with increasing age, **HIV_Adult_Survival_Scale_ Parameter_Slope** should be set to a negative number.

Name: HIV_Adult_Survival_Shape_Parameter
Description: This parameter determines the shape of the Weibull distribution used to determine age-dependent survival time for individuals infected with HIV.

Name: HIV_Child_Survival_Slow_Progressor_Scale
Description: The Weibull scale parameter describing the distribution of HIV survival for children who are slower progressors.

Name: HIV_Child_Survival_Slow_Progressor_Shape
Description: The Weibull shape parameter describing the distribution of HIV survival for children who are slower progressors.

Name: Sexual_Debut_Age_Female_Weibull_Heterogeneity
Description: The inverse shape of the Weibull distribution for female debut age.

Name: Sexual_Debut_Age_Female_Weibull_Scale
Description: The scale term of the Weibull distribution for female debut age.

Name: Sexual_Debut_Age_Male_Weibull_Heterogeneity
Description: The inverse shape of the Weibull distribution for male debut age.

Name: Sexual_Debut_Age_Male_Weibull_Scale
Description: The scale term of the Weibull distribution for male debut age.

Name: Sexual_Debut_Age_Min
Description: The minimum age at which individuals become eligible to form sexual relationships.

Name: Sexual_Debut_Age_Setting_Type
Description: The **WEIBULL** setting will initialize the debut age of each person using a Weibull distribution according to their gender with the **Sexual_Debut_Age_XXX_Weibull_Heterogeneity** and **Sexual_Debut_Age_XXX_Weibull_Scale** parameters. If the **FROM_INTERVENTION** setting is used the individual's debut age will not be set unless it is set by the **SetSexualDebutAge** intervention. Accepted values are WEIBULL or FROM_INTERVENTION.
